description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a matte black finish and a collapsible stock for adjustable length. The rifle is equipped with a pistol grip, a prominent trigger guard, and a long barrel with a cylindrical profile. A sling is attached to the rifle, running from the stock to the front end, enhancing portability. The upper receiver appears to have a rail system for mounting optics or accessories, though only basic iron sights are visible. The magazine is not clearly visible, suggesting it may be internal or not present in this depiction. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and modularity for urban or tactical use.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, pistol grip, long barrel, and attached sling. Features a rail system and basic iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, collapsible stock, pistol grip, sling, and barrel details.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, narrow profile, and alignment of the stock and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the sling attachment and overall rifle silhouette.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
